name: opportunities.feeds.rebuild
description: Every 3 hours: regenerate the per-country feed manifests on R2 (/feeds/<cc>.json + /feeds/default.json + /feeds/index.json). The frontend Cascade reads these manifests for first-paint on unfiltered / anonymous requests, so the site stays snappy without every user session hitting /api/feed. Partial success (some shards failed) returns 207 Multi-Status — Trustage should NOT retry on 207 since the next scheduled run will pick up the failed shards naturally. Retries fire only on 5xx network / timeout errors.
